# Sample extensions

**Data field**

One or more atoms containing additional information for selecting and drawing the subtitle.

## Overview

The following table lists the currently defined subtitle sample extensions.



## Data fields

- **Text size**: A 16-bit word that specifies the length (number of bytes) of the subtitle text.
- **Text**: The subtitle text.

items.description: A 16-bit word that specifies the length (number of bytes) of the subtitle text.
items.name: Text size
